presentation.title: AI Workbench Local — Policy / Contract Comparison
presentation.subtitle: Executive comparison review of grounded document differences
presentation.author: AI Workbench Local

executive_summary:
Executive Comparison:  
The Access Review Evidence Log addresses gaps in control closure by requiring verification of incomplete evidence items, while the Privileged Account Approval Email mandates ongoing governance through scoped access, continuous logging, and quarterly vendor recertification to sustain compliance.

- Access Review Evidence Log requires verification of missing or unverified evidence items to close controls.  
- Privileged Account Approval Email requires quarterly vendor confirmation and recertification of access.  
- Evidence Log focuses on artifact provenance and status tracking; Approval Email emphasizes usage scoping and logging compliance.  
- Evidence Log applies to vendor oversight controls; Approval Email governs privileged access for specific administrators.  
- Evidence Log closure depends on resolving incomplete items; Approval Email requires periodic vendor validation to maintain access.  
- Evidence Log is a control register; Approval Email is a governance directive with enforceable conditions.
key_highlights: The Access Review Evidence Log addresses gaps in control closure by requiring verification of incomplete evidence items, while the Privileged Account Approval Email mandates ongoing governance through scoped access, continuous logging, and quarterly vendor recertification to sustain compliance.

Evidence Log applies to vendor oversight controls; Approval Email governs privileged access for specific administrators.
